entries.text:
Verse 15

world kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

save (See Scofield "Romans 1:16").

sinners Grace (in salvation). 2 Timothy 1:14; 2 Timothy 1:15; 2 Timothy 1:9; Romans 3:24 (See Scofield "John 1:17")

Verse 17

immortal incorruptible.

invisible Cf. (See Scofield "John 1:18")

Verse 20

Hymenaeus and Alexander

It is significant as bearing upon the seriousness of all false teaching, and particularly as related to resurrection, that Paul calls it blasphemy to teach that "the resurrection is past already" 2 Timothy 2:17; 2 Timothy 2:18.
